programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: S2 E7 — Unique piecesWhen you think of Aston Martin, you think of James Bond and incredibly expensive and sleek sports cars. The British luxury brand also had limousines in its range. The show presents the Aston Martin Lagonda Shooting Brake and other unique items.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E10 — Episode 10 Hamburg Airport is experimenting with the climate-neutral production of kerosene. It's also about the Porsche 911 Turbo at the Hockenheimring with ex-rally world champion Walter Röhrl. Everyone is also testing the Aston Martin DBS Superleggera.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S2 E33 — Porsche 911 vs. Chevrolet CorvetteThe Porsche 911 and the Chevrolet Corvette are two legends and dream cars. The cars are sports car icons in Europe and the USA. They shine with a unique design and are considered the epitome of a sports car.

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: S1 E22 — Tourists in the Green Hell 22 Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: BMW M1 MeetingEvery year, thousands of motorsport fans make the pilgrimage to the Histo-Cup Austria at the Salzburgring to admire more than 200 historic racing cars in action. We saw the first presentation of the BMW M1 Procar series since 1979 there.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S3 E15 — Parking Space WarEvery day, city dwellers wage a nerve-wracking battle for the last remaining parking space. The number of vehicles on the roads is constantly increasing. In addition, the models are constantly growing in length and width, such as the BMW X6.

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: S1 E8 — Aston Martin V8 VantageThe highlights from all eras of automobile history: Various contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. A treat for all sports car connoisseurs: the Aston Martin V8 Vantage, the British coupé in the spotlight.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: S1 E12 - T4 by Samy DeluxeThe topics of the show include: "Crazy tour bus: The T4 of Samy Deluxe and his gang gets a new life" and "XS three with XL performance: The 3 Series compact from Schnitzer mutates into a sports car horror".

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: S2 E3 — Man vs. MachineThe Stunt Heroes are developing the plot for a chase between a parkour runner and a pursuer in a car. An assembly hall offers enough space for this. Here, chase sequences, corner drifts, jumps and the final escape jump of the hunted person into a passing gravel dump truck can be carried out cleanly. The timing has to be precise, otherwise the stuntman will end up kissing the ground.

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: S6 E242 — Classics on the way to the auction In this episode of Top Speed, presenter Martin Utberg visits the classic car gallery in Toffen, Switzerland.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: S16 - Curve RobbersThe show presents sleek sports cars and fast touring cars on the asphalt.

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 7
programme.desc: S7 E5 — A Suspicious CyclistMike and Chris pursue a suspicious cyclist. Meanwhile, the Road Crime Unit finds heroin in a Ford after a chase. And dog handler Lee takes care of a drunk with his German Shepherd Sharp.

programme.title: German Rallycross Championship 2024
programme.desc: Eight races on four different routes: The German Rallycross Championship is looking for its new champion for 2024. The drivers fight for the titles in six different classes on rallycross routes in Germany and the Netherlands. Short sprint races take place on tracks with a mix of asphalt and gravel.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Icon of the New Heritage wave: BMW R nineT In 2013, the BMW R nineT, a puristic retro roadster, came onto the market that one would not have expected from the brand from Munich, which is considered to be conservative. The modern technology is deliberately prepared for individual conversion to custom bikes, which are becoming increasingly popular in the young motorcycle scene worldwide. The program shows the idea behind the concept of the retro roadster and what qualities and possible weaknesses the classic boxer motorcycle reveals in practical testing.

programme.desc: A car hill climb to the summit of Pikes Peak in Colorado, USA.

programme.title: Rear view mirror

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.desc: S1 E5 — Duels in Formula 1Motorsport has been characterized by feuds since its early days. Even in Formula 1 there are always heated rivalries and duels. There are reports of exciting battles for world championship titles in the premier class of formula racing.

programme.title: Rolex Monterey Motorsports Reunion
programme.desc: Highlight 2025The Rolex Monterey Motorsports Reunion will be presented, in which historic racing cars will compete.

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: In this episode of the TT2024 we are bringing the second race of the super athletes and the super twins in a double pack. The opportunity for Hicky and Davey to counter and for Michael Dunlop to further increase his record winning account at the TT.

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: S1 E5 Ambulances are accompanied on their missions to help those in need across the country.

programme.title: Classic Ride

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E32 — Episode 32 This time the show reports on the Repco Supercars Championship 2024.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S1 — BMW 3 SeriesThe BMW 3 Series is the epitome of the sports sedan. Since its debut in 1975, the 3 Series has been the undisputed leader of the premium segment. More than 13 million customers drive it worldwide. The show shows all models and the vehicle history.

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: S1 E2 — Tourists in the Green Hell 2 Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Enduro Park HechlingenThe Enduro Park in Hechlingen is a former quarry that was transformed into one of the leading enduro training areas in Europe in the 1990s. Qualified instructors instruct motocross fans in driving skills.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S3 E18 — Drive of the futureAn attempt by manufacturers at the Paris Motor Show is to replace the traditional combustion engine with alternative drives. Mercedes-Benz founded the Generation EQ sub-brand specifically for this purpose. Volkswagen also wants to introduce electric models.

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: S2 E20 — NSU Ro 80 Exciting images show the viewer the highlights from all eras of automobile history. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. This time the NSU Ro 80 is in the spotlight with its revolutionary aerodynamic body.

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: S1 E6The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: S1 E16 — Assistance systems on two-wheelersAssistance systems on two-wheelers usually seem exotic or even unthinkable. BMW is now offering the blind spot warning system for the first time. This is ideal for the dense traffic in big cities, the home territory of the new C 650 GT maxi scooter.

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: S1 E8 — Episode 8One of the toughest competitions takes place in Langenaltheim, the Steinbeisser Trophy.

programme.desc: E104 — Araxá, Round 1The start of the 2025 UCI Mountain Bike World Cup season leads to Brazilian terrain in Araxá.

programme.title: The Clip Show
programme.desc: S1 E9 — Spectacular ViewsThe show reports on the best extreme athletes on their adventures. This includes, for example, kayaking through Canada's Keyhole Falls or a city tour of Istanbul in a Formula 1 car.

programme.title: BIKE: Shires
programme.desc: Shires is a cycling film shot over two years and narrated by Rob Warner.

programme.title: The Clip Show
programme.desc: S1 E3 — Endurance swimmer goes through hellExtreme sports, adventure and bizarre things on land and in the water.

programme.title: ÖKK Bike Revolution
programme.desc: The single trail network in Davos covers over 700 km and offers elite riders the ultimate cross-country playground. The flowing trails make Davos one of the most attractive bike destinations in the Alps.

programme.title: The Streets Don't Lie
programme.desc: London - LeipzigDjibril Cissé picks three players on the streets of London, England. But only one is allowed to train with RB Leipzig.

programme.title: ANYONE
programme.desc: S1 E7 — Family TiesYoung talent Antoine Bernède explains why he moved from PSG to Salzburg. The draw for the group stage of the Champions League is also eagerly awaited.

programme.title: ANYONE
programme.desc: S1 E9 — No F****** Friendly MatchAnticipation, excitement, disappointment: The final episode is tough when FC Red Bull Salzburg takes on Liverpool at the legendary Anfield Road.

programme.title: The Streets Don't Lie
programme.desc: Berlin - SalzburgThree players with a tough past come to train at the Red Bull Academy in Salzburg. Previously they struggled to assert themselves due to poor health, lack of self-confidence or lack of support.

programme.title: Neymar Jr. Full Access
programme.desc: S1 E248 hours until the derby: Neymar Jr. between home, focus and stadium pressure - an exclusive look behind the scenes of a superstar before the big game.

programme.title: ANYONE
programme.desc: S1 E2 — Goal KickThe team is close to bringing Rasmus Kristensen into the squad. Meanwhile, Patrick Farkas talks about the upcoming competition as the team prepares for the first game of the season away against Rapid Vienna.

programme.title: Signed or Released
programme.desc: S1 E1 — Playing under pressureFive football talents under the age of 19 are fighting for their future at RB Leipzig. Before the first game, the pressure among them is already growing immensely as the coaches watch them closely and check who can make the jump.

programme.title: Signed or Released
programme.desc: S1 E2 — Struggling to break throughThe pressure is growing at RB Leipzig: Nani Mekonnen gets his chance in first team training, while Dominic Minz unfortunately has to tremble after his red card. What the team needs even more now is a win.

programme.title: ANYONE
programme.desc: S1 E5 — Totally realThe episode presents the game between Real Madrid and FC Red Bull Salzburg in 2019. The referee and sporting director Christoph Freund also goes into more detail about the history of FC Red Bull Salzburg.

programme.title: WHOOP UCI Mountainbike Weltcup
programme.desc: The broadcast of the races of the UCI Mountain Bike World Cup.

programme.title: The Clip Show
programme.desc: S1 E9 — Spectacular ViewsThe show reports on the best extreme athletes on their adventures. This includes, for example, kayaking through Canada's Keyhole Falls or a city tour of Istanbul in a Formula 1 car.

programme.title: UCI Mountain Bike World Series
programme.desc: High speed in the Alps: The highlights from La Thuile show downhill mountain biking on fast, technical trails where courage, precision and control are crucial.

programme.title: UCI Mountain Bike World Series
programme.desc: E81 — Loudenvielle, HighlightsLoudenvielle-Peyragudes is a dramatic setting for downhill mountain bike racing. Watch highlights from the competition set against the backdrop of the beautiful French countryside.

programme.desc: Shires is a cycling film shot over two years and narrated by Rob Warner.

programme.title: The Clip Show
programme.desc: S1 E3 — Endurance swimmer goes through hellExtreme sports, adventure and bizarre things on land and in the water.

programme.title: The Clip Show
programme.desc: S1 E10 — Extreme Kayaking in South AmericaThe next challenge is upon us! In Chile, Brandon Semenuk wants to kayak across the three most challenging rivers in South America.

programme.title: The Clip Show
programme.desc: S1 E9 — Spectacular ViewsThe show reports on the best extreme athletes on their adventures. This includes, for example, kayaking through Canada's Keyhole Falls or a city tour of Istanbul in a Formula 1 car.

programme.title: ÖKK Bike Revolution
programme.desc: The single trail network in Davos covers over 700 km and offers elite riders the ultimate cross-country playground. The flowing trails make Davos one of the most attractive bike destinations in the Alps.

programme.title: OUTDEH - The Youth of Jamaica
programme.desc: Three young Jamaicans tell their stories. Rapper Bakersteez hopes for an international career, Shama wants to become Jamaica's first pro surfer and Romar shows us life in his community.

programme.title: ADVENTURE: The Last Step
programme.desc: Small moments are just as crucial in an athlete's career as monumental victories. The show follows climbing, surfing and skating talents Kauli Vaast, Vincent Matheron and Oriane Bertone as they prepare for important events.

programme.title: MISSION 2TO4
programme.desc: S1 E1 — Test Rally TunisiaNew vehicle, new team, new game: Dakar champion Matthias Walkner swaps the bike for a buggy and starts the Dakar 2027 mission. This promises to be a comeback full of risks and new challenges.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: S1 E1 — Man OverboardIn 2013, Jimmy Smith made history with a furious comeback in the America's Cup. Ten years later, he wants to transform the US SailGP team into title contenders - but is thwarted by the team's owners.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: S1 E3 — SeriesTeam Italy is training diligently for the fifth season. Team USA wants to show courage.

programme.title: CLIFF DIVING: 444 Days – Aidan Heslops Comeback
programme.desc: 444 Days - Aidan Heslop's comebackFormer World Series champion Aidan Heslop is facing the toughest comeback of his career: In just 44 days, the Brit wants to get back to the top of the world and reclaim his place at 27 m.

programme.title: Red Bull Dolomitenmann
programme.desc: S1 E7 — 2025The Red Bull Dolomitenmann 2025: The toughest team competition in the world. At the 38th Red Bull Dolomitenmann, the athletes go far beyond their physical and mental limits.

programme.title: Pro Climbing League 2026: London – Highlights
programme.desc: 2026 London - HighlightsHead-to-head for the title: In London, the world's best climbers engage in an explosive knockout competition full of speed, pressure and precision on identical routes.

programme.title: Adventures Unpacked mit Beau Miles
programme.desc: S1 E2 — Paragliding over an active volcanoIn Tanzania, Tom de Dorlodot and Horacio Llorens fly over a volcano with a paraglider.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: DallasIn Dallas, the Red Bull soapbox race is celebrating its comeback: Between detailed replicas and completely crazy ideas, teams fight for victory with speed, courage and creativity.

programme.title: Skate Tales
programme.desc: S5 E5 — Dern BrothersMadars follows the Dern Brothers from Florida to California to watch them shake up skateboarding on YouTube.

programme.title: Red Bull Drop In Tour
programme.desc: Skate demo Down Under - Fat tricks through four citiesFour cities, one mission: The Red Bull Drop In Tour brings skate stars to Australia.

programme.title: SURF: Shaping Jordy
programme.desc: For the first time in 10 years, surfer Jordy Smith is spending the winter in his native South Africa. With the free surfing master Mikey February he goes in search of the best waves.

programme.title: Red Bull BC One
programme.desc: One World Final JapanExperience the rhythm of Tokyo as the top breakdancers battle for glory at the Red Bull BC One World Final.

programme.title: The Bush Years: Family. Duty...
programme.desc: ...Power: Fathers and Sons: After returning from war, George H.W. Bush is reunited with his sweetheart Barbara. They married and had their first child - another future president. (Part 1 of 6) (S)

programme.title: Egypt's Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Follow a team of archaeologists as they examine a rare mass grave dating to the collapse of ancient Egypt's Old Kingdom. (Part 1 of 2)

programme.desc: Invasion: Invasion - In May 1941, 14,000 German paratroopers supported by nearly a thousand aircraft were dropped on the island in a unique blitzkrieg operation. (Part 1 of 3) (S)

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Isles
programme.desc: On the west coast of Scotland are a group of islands that are so remote they almost seem to have been forgotten by the rest of the world and are populated by just a few hardy souls. (Part 3 of 6) (S)
